title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is an open source AI image generation model designed for high resolution 4K image synthesis. The tool integrates with ComfyUI and supports text-to-image and upscaling workflows using Gemma 2B as its text encoder.
